Where the relevance lies

This is the point at which the story reaches the conceptual machinery of contemporary cosmology. In cosmology, every relevant result presses on the standard model at the largest scales. What matters is whether the evidence changes how we read cosmic expansion, large-scale structure or the energy content of the universe.

What is still open

The methodological reservation here is not a side note. Preprint not yet peer reviewed. Treat it as provisional work, not as a settled conclusion.

The decisive point now is whether the effect survives confrontation with other surveys, other calibrations and tighter systematic controls. Before that, the result still has to survive formal peer review.
